'''nangovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmetal|roadmetal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmetal|roadmetal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nangovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nængeveth|nængeveth]] || [[word:nængevej|nængevej]] || [[word:nængevesh|nængevesh]] || [[word:nængeve|nængeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangongovoth|nangongovoth]] || [[word:nangongovoj|nangongovoj]] || [[word:nangongovosh|nangongovosh]] || [[word:nangongovo|nangongovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangovoth|nangovoth]] || [[word:nangovoj|nangovoj]] || [[word:nangovosh|nangovosh]] || [[word:nangovo|nangovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangofvoth|nangofvoth]] || [[word:nangofvoj|nangofvoj]] || [[word:nangofvosh|nangofvosh]] || [[word:nangofvof|nangofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nangovotho|nangovotho]] || [[word:nangovojo|nangovojo]] || [[word:nangovosho|nangovosho]] || [[word:nangovoko|nangovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nangovoth|nangovoth]] || [[word:nangovoj|nangovoj]] || [[word:nangovosh|nangovosh]] || [[word:nangovo|nangovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nangovothol|nangovothol]] || [[word:nangovojol|nangovojol]] || [[word:nangovoshol|nangovoshol]] || [[word:nangovokol|nangovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nangovothotho|nangovothotho]] || [[word:nangovojojo|nangovojojo]] || [[word:nangovoshosho|nangovoshosho]] || [[word:nangovoko|nangovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nangovothon|nangovothon]] || [[word:nangovojon|nangovojon]] || [[word:nangovoshon|nangovoshon]] || [[word:nangovokon|nangovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nangovothoro|nangovothoro]] || [[word:nangovojoro|nangovojoro]] || [[word:nangovoshoro|nangovoshoro]] || [[word:nangovokoro|nangovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
